calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger (Law Practice Administrator) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Voorsanger stated that he filed a declaration regarding fees and that he agrees with the Probate Examiner that $460.00 in the request for costs should be reduced. Mr. Voorsanger also addressed the issue of the Paralegal fees stating that they were each performing different rolls and needed to be in communication, that it was very time consuming, that there are funds in the trust to pay the fees and that it is just the IOLTA account. In addition, Mr. Voorsanger stated that the operating account was gone and that the Surviving Spouse previously received the funds, but not improperly. The Amended Petition to Terminate Law Practice Administration, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Law Practice Administrator And For Authority To Pay Law Practice Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Appointing Law Practice Administrator And For Authority To Pay Law Practice Administrator
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Jan-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Nelson in Propria Persona.
Douglas Voorsanger (nominated Law Parctice Administrator) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it does not see any basis on which the law practice is an asset of the Trust, and that it understands there is a will that gets it there, but that would take a proper 13100 Declaration. Mr. Voorsanger stated that he sent an e-mail to the Probate Examiner and spoke of other alternatives. The Court noted that the declaration that was filed on December 8th does not satisfy the requirement, that it does not address date and place of death, and that it does not address whether anyone else has a superior right. The Petition for Order Appointing Law Practice Administrator, etc. is continued to January 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any further filings are to be filed and provided to the Court no later than January 23, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
